scripts.allureReportAllTest: rimraf allure-results allure-report && npx playwright test tests/clientAppPO.spec.js && npx allure generate ./allure-results -o ./allure-report && npx allure open ./allure-report
scripts.projectChrome: rimraf allure-results allure-report && npx playwright test tests/clientAppPO.spec.js --config playwright.config1.js --project=chromeTest && npx allure generate ./allure-results -o ./allure-report && npx allure open ./allure-report
